source.prompt: AWS holds 32% cloud market share, Azure 23%, GCP 11%, Alibaba 8%, others 26%.

args.code: function _cc(a,b,c){const ax=a[0],ay=a[1],bx=b[0],by=b[1],cx=c[0],cy=c[1];const d=2*(ax*(by-cy)+bx*(cy-ay)+cx*(ay-by));if(Math.abs(d)<1e-12)return null;const ux=((ax*ax+ay*ay)*(by-cy)+(bx*bx+by*by)*(cy-ay)+(cx*cx+cy*cy)*(ay-by))/d;const uy=((ax*ax+ay*ay)*(cx-bx)+(bx*bx+by*by)*(ax-cx)+(cx*cx+cy*cy)*(bx-ax))/d;return{x:ux,y:uy,r:Math.hypot(ux-ax,uy-ay)};}function _ek(p,q){return p[0]<q[0]||(p[0]===q[0]&&p[1]<q[1])?(p[0]+','+p[1]+'|'+q[0]+','+q[1]):(q[0]+','+q[1]+'|'+p[0]+','+p[1]);}function _mk(a,b,c){const cc=_cc(a,b,c);return{a,b,c,cc,cr:cc?cc.r:0};}function delaunayTriangles(pts,bd){const dx=bd.maxX-bd.minX,dy=bd.maxY-bd.minY,cx=(bd.minX+bd.maxX)/2,cy=(bd.minY+bd.maxY)/2,m=Math.max(dx,dy)*20;const sa=[cx-m,cy+m*0.5],sb=[cx+m,cy+m*0.5],sc=[cx,cy-m];let tris=[_mk(sa,sb,sc)];for(const p of pts){const edges=new Map(),bad=[];tris=tris.filter(t=>{if(t.cc){const dxc=p[0]-t.cc.x,dyc=p[1]-t.cc.y;if(dxc*dxc+dyc*dyc<t.cr*t.cr-1e-9){bad.push(t);for(const[u,v]of[[t.a,t.b],[t.b,t.c],[t.c,t.a]])edges.set(_ek(u,v),(edges.get(_ek(u,v))||0)+1);return false;}}return true;});for(const t of bad)for(const[u,v]of[[t.a,t.b],[t.b,t.c],[t.c,t.a]])if(edges.get(_ek(u,v))===1)tris.push(_mk(u,v,p));}const sup=[sa,sb,sc];return tris.filter(t=>{for(const v of[t.a,t.b,t.c])for(const s of sup)if(v[0]===s[0]&&v[1]===s[1])return false;return true;});}function voronoiCells(tris,sites){return sites.map(s=>{const inc=tris.filter(t=>(t.a[0]===s[0]&&t.a[1]===s[1])||(t.b[0]===s[0]&&t.b[1]===s[1])||(t.c[0]===s[0]&&t.c[1]===s[1]));const cs=inc.map(t=>t.cc).filter(c=>c).map(c=>({x:c.x,y:c.y,a:Math.atan2(c.y-s[1],c.x-s[0])})).sort((a,b)=>a.a-b.a);return{site:s,polygon:cs.map(c=>[c.x,c.y])};});}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const data=[{label:'AWS',share:0.32,seed:[170,150],color:[255,153,51]},{label:'Azure',share:0.23,seed:[390,130],color:[0,114,198]},{label:'GCP',share:0.11,seed:[460,260],color:[234,67,53]},{label:'Alibaba',share:0.08,seed:[260,300],color:[255,102,0]},{label:'Others',share:0.26,seed:[100,280],color:[120,120,120]}];const sites=data.map(d=>d.seed);const tris=delaunayTriangles(sites,{minX:-300,maxX:900,minY:-200,maxY:560});const cells=voronoiCells(tris,sites);for(let i=0;i<cells.length;i++){const c=cells[i],d=data[i];if(c.polygon.length>=3){const alpha=70+d.share*550;fill(d.color[0],d.color[1],d.color[2],alpha);stroke(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);strokeWeight(3);beginShape();for(const v of c.polygon)vertex(v[0],v[1]);endShape(CLOSE);}}for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++){const d=data[i],sx=sites[i][0],sy=sites[i][1];noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);textFont('Inter');drawingContext.font='700 20px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+',1)';drawingContext.fillText(d.label,sx,sy-6);drawingContext.font='600 15px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.fillText(Math.round(d.share*100)+'%',sx,sy+16);}noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],60);textFont('Inter');textSize(11);textAlign(CENTER,BOTTOM);text('Cloud Market Share — Voronoi Territory Map',300,356);}

source.prompt: AWS holds 32% cloud market share, Azure 23%, GCP 11%, Alibaba 8%, others 26%.

args.code: function _cc(a,b,c){const ax=a[0],ay=a[1],bx=b[0],by=b[1],cx=c[0],cy=c[1];const d=2*(ax*(by-cy)+bx*(cy-ay)+cx*(ay-by));if(Math.abs(d)<1e-12)return null;const ux=((ax*ax+ay*ay)*(by-cy)+(bx*bx+by*by)*(cy-ay)+(cx*cx+cy*cy)*(ay-by))/d;const uy=((ax*ax+ay*ay)*(cx-bx)+(bx*bx+by*by)*(ax-cx)+(cx*cx+cy*cy)*(bx-ax))/d;return{x:ux,y:uy,r:Math.hypot(ux-ax,uy-ay)};}function _ek(p,q){return p[0]<q[0]||(p[0]===q[0]&&p[1]<q[1])?(p[0]+','+p[1]+'|'+q[0]+','+q[1]):(q[0]+','+q[1]+'|'+p[0]+','+p[1]);}function _mk(a,b,c){const cc=_cc(a,b,c);return{a,b,c,cc,cr:cc?cc.r:0};}function delaunayTriangles(pts,bd){const dx=bd.maxX-bd.minX,dy=bd.maxY-bd.minY,cx=(bd.minX+bd.maxX)/2,cy=(bd.minY+bd.maxY)/2,m=Math.max(dx,dy)*20;const sa=[cx-m,cy+m*0.5],sb=[cx+m,cy+m*0.5],sc=[cx,cy-m];let tris=[_mk(sa,sb,sc)];for(const p of pts){const edges=new Map(),bad=[];tris=tris.filter(t=>{if(t.cc){const dxc=p[0]-t.cc.x,dyc=p[1]-t.cc.y;if(dxc*dxc+dyc*dyc<t.cr*t.cr-1e-9){bad.push(t);for(const[u,v]of[[t.a,t.b],[t.b,t.c],[t.c,t.a]])edges.set(_ek(u,v),(edges.get(_ek(u,v))||0)+1);return false;}}return true;});for(const t of bad)for(const[u,v]of[[t.a,t.b],[t.b,t.c],[t.c,t.a]])if(edges.get(_ek(u,v))===1)tris.push(_mk(u,v,p));}const sup=[sa,sb,sc];return tris.filter(t=>{for(const v of[t.a,t.b,t.c])for(const s of sup)if(v[0]===s[0]&&v[1]===s[1])return false;return true;});}function voronoiCells(tris,sites){return sites.map(s=>{const inc=tris.filter(t=>(t.a[0]===s[0]&&t.a[1]===s[1])||(t.b[0]===s[0]&&t.b[1]===s[1])||(t.c[0]===s[0]&&t.c[1]===s[1]));const cs=inc.map(t=>t.cc).filter(c=>c).map(c=>({x:c.x,y:c.y,a:Math.atan2(c.y-s[1],c.x-s[0])})).sort((a,b)=>a.a-b.a);return{site:s,polygon:cs.map(c=>[c.x,c.y])};});}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const data=[{label:'AWS',share:0.32,color:[255,153,51],seed:[160,140]},{label:'Azure',share:0.23,color:[0,120,212],seed:[400,130]},{label:'GCP',share:0.11,color:[52,168,83],seed:[490,260]},{label:'Alibaba',share:0.08,color:[255,106,0],seed:[300,290]},{label:'Others',share:0.26,color:[160,160,160],seed:[100,280]}];const sites=data.map(d=>d.seed);const pad=80;const tris=delaunayTriangles(sites,{minX:-pad,maxX:600+pad,minY:-pad,maxY:360+pad});const cells=voronoiCells(tris,sites);for(let i=0;i<cells.length;i++){const c=cells[i];const col=data[i].color;const alpha=Math.round(60+data[i].share*550);fill(col[0],col[1],col[2],alpha);stroke(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);strokeWeight(3);if(c.polygon.length>=3){beginShape();for(const v of c.polygon){const cx=Math.max(-10,Math.min(610,v[0]));const cy=Math.max(-10,Math.min(370,v[1]));vertex(cx,cy);}endShape(CLOSE);}}for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++){const sx=sites[i][0];const sy=sites[i][1];const col=data[i].color;fill(col[0],col[1],col[2],220);noStroke();ellipse(sx,sy,48,48);fill(255);textFont('Inter');drawingContext.font='700 13px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.textBaseline='middle';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.95)';drawingContext.fillText(data[i].label,sx,sy-6);drawingContext.font='600 12px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.fillText(Math.round(data[i].share*100)+'%',sx,sy+9);}noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2],40);strokeWeight(1);for(const t of tris){if(t.cc){const cx=t.cc.x,cy=t.cc.y;if(cx>0&&cx<600&&cy>0&&cy<360){for(const nb of[[t.a,t.b],[t.b,t.c],[t.c,t.a]]){const mc=[(nb[0][0]+nb[1][0])/2,(nb[0][1]+nb[1][1])/2];if(mc[0]>0&&mc[0]<600&&mc[1]>0&&mc[1]<360){line(cx,cy,mc[0],mc[1]);}}}}}}}

fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const data=[{label:'AWS',share:0.32,site:[160,150],color:[255,153,0]},{label:'Azure',share:0.23,site:[390,130],color:[0,114,198]},{label:'GCP',share:0.11,site:[450,270],color:[52,168,83]},{label:'Alibaba',share:0.08,site:[200,290],color:[255,100,0]},{label:'Others',share:0.26,site:[310,210],color:[160,160,160]}];const c=cells[i];if(c.polygon.length>=3){const col=data[i].color;const i=0;i<data.length;i++){const sx=sites[i][0],sy=sites[i][1];const col=data[i].color;noStroke();fill(col[0],col[1],col[2],220);ellipse(sx,sy,44,44);fill(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);textFont('Inter');textSize(12);textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);textStyle(BOLD);text(data[i].label.substring(0,3).toUpperCase(),sx,sy-2);textStyle(NORMAL);textSize(11);text(Math.round(data[i].share*100)+'%',sx,sy+11);}fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);noStroke();textFont('Inter');textAlign(CENTER,TOP);drawingContext.font='700 22px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText('Cloud Market Share',300,14);textFont('Inter');textSize(12);textAlign(LEFT,TOP);const lx=22,ly=310,lw=100;for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++){fill(data[i].color[0],data[i].color[1],data[i].color[2]);noStroke();rect(lx+i*112,ly,14,14,3);fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);textSize(12);text(data[i].label+' '+Math.round(data[i].share*100)+'%',lx+i*112+18,ly+1);}}

cs=inc.map(t=>t.cc).filter(c=>c).map(c=>({x:c.x,y:c.y,a:Math.atan2(c.y-s[1],c.x-s[0])})).sort((a,b)=>a.a-b.a);return{site:s,polygon:cs.map(c=>[c.x,c.y])};});}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const data=[{label:'AWS',share:0.32,seed:[160,155],color:[255,153,0]},{label:'Azure',share:0.23,seed:[370,130],color:[0,114,198]},{label:'GCP',share:0.11,seed:[470,260],color:[52,168,83]},{label:'Alibaba',share:0.08,seed:[310,295],color:[255,90,0]},{label:'Others',share:0.26,seed:[130,290],color:[150,150,160]}];const sites=data.map(d=>d.seed);const tris=delaunayTriangles(sites,{minX:-300,maxX:900,minY:-300,maxY:660});const cells=voronoiCells(tris,sites);for(let i=0;i<cells.length;i++){const c=cells[i],d=data[i];if(c.polygon.length>=3){const baseAlpha=80+d.share*520;fill(d.color[0],d.color[1],d.color[2],Math.min(baseAlpha,230));noStroke();beginShape();for(const v of c.polygon){const cx=Math.max(-10,Math.min(610,v[0])),cy=Math.max(-10,Math.min(370,v[1]));vertex(cx,cy);}endShape(CLOSE);}}stroke(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);strokeWeight(2.5);for(let i=0;i<cells.length;i++){const c=cells[i];if(c.polygon.length>=3){noFill();beginShape();for(const v of c.polygon){const cx=Math.max(-10,Math.min(610,v[0])),cy=Math.max(-10,Math.min(370,v[1]));vertex(cx,cy);}endShape(CLOSE);}}for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++){const d=data[i],sx=sites[i][0],sy=sites[i][1];noStroke();fill(255,255,255,200);const lw=d.share>=0.20?72:d.share>=0.10?58:44;const lh=d.share>=0.20?44:d.share>=0.10?36:28;rect(sx-lw/2,sy-lh/2,lw,lh,6);fill(30,27,30);textFont('Inter');textAlign(CENTER,CENTER);const nameSize=d.share>=0.20?15:d.share>=0.10?13:11;textSize(nameSize);drawingContext.font='700 '+nameSize+'px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='center';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba(30,27,30,1)';drawingContext.fillText(d.label,sx,sy-7);drawingContext.font='500 '+(nameSize+2)+'px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgba(30,27,30,0.9)';drawingContext.fillText(Math.round(d.share*100)+'%',sx,sy+10);drawAtlasIcon(i===0?'chart-bar':i===1?'cloud':i===2?'database':i===3?'globe':'chart-pie',sx,sy-26,i>=3?16:20,'rgba(30,27,30,0.7)');}
